##RRUFFID=R141116
##IDEAL CHEMISTRY=BaCu_2_Si_2_O_7_
##LOCALITY=Wessels mine, Kalahari manganese field, Northern Cape Province, South Africa
##OWNER=RRUFF
##SOURCE=Jaco and Tania Janse van Nieuwenhuizen
##DESCRIPTION=Dark blue granular or blocky crystals associated with light-blue platy lavinskyite (R141115) and blue wesselsite.
##STATUS=The identification of this mineral is confirmed by single-crystal X-ray diffraction and chemical analysis
##URL=https://www.rruff.net/odr/rruff_sample/R141116
##MEASURED CHEMISTRY=Ba_1.01_Sr_0.02_Cu_2.03_Na_0.01_Si_1.97_O_7_ ; (Scottyite is light grey material in image, associated with dark grey R141115 lavinskyite)
##DIFFRACTION SAMPLE DESCRIPTION=Single crystal, powder profile is calculated
##CELL PARAMETERS=a: 6.846 b: 13.144 c: 6.877 alpha: 90 beta: 90 gamma: 90 volume: 618.86 crystal system: orthorhombic
